languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

languages.text: {n}Великан издает металлический лязг, в котором странным образом угадывается недовольство.{/n} "Человек, я обращаюсь к тебе на языке, который ты долж{mf|ен|на} понимать. Ответь на мой вопрос".

traits.locale_text: {n}Великан издает металлический лязг, в котором странным образом угадывается недовольство.{/n} "Человек, я обращаюсь к тебе на языке, который ты долж{mf|ен|на} понимать. Ответь на мой вопрос".
traits.speaker: Trazyn_Collector_Projection

{n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

languages.text: {n}那巨人发出一阵金属碰撞般的响声，而你不知怎么的就能明白那是他在表达不悦。{/n}“人类，我正在用你理应听得懂的语言跟你说话。回答我的问题。”
languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

traits.locale_text: {n}那巨人发出一阵金属碰撞般的响声，而你不知怎么的就能明白那是他在表达不悦。{/n}“人类，我正在用你理应听得懂的语言跟你说话。回答我的问题。”

languages.text: {n}El gigante emite un chirrido metálico que entiendes, de alguna forma, que indica su irritación.{/n} «Human{mf|o|a}, me dirijo a ti en un idioma que deberías entender. Responde a mi pregunta».
languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

traits.locale_text: {n}El gigante emite un chirrido metálico que entiendes, de alguna forma, que indica su irritación.{/n} «Human{mf|o|a}, me dirijo a ti en un idioma que deberías entender. Responde a mi pregunta».

languages.text: {n}Le géant émet un bruit métallique, qui vous semble indiquer son déplaisir.{/n} « {mf|Humain|Humaine}, je m'adresse à vous dans une langue que vous êtes en mesure de comprendre. Répondez-moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le géant émet un bruit métallique, qui vous semble indiquer son déplaisir.{/n} « {mf|Humain|Humaine}, je m'adresse à vous dans une langue que vous êtes en mesure de comprendre. Répondez-moi. »

languages.text: {n}Dev adam, hoşnutsuzluğunu gösterdiğini bir şekilde bildiğin metalik bir çarpışma sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "İnsan... Sana anlaman gereken bir dilde hitap ediyorum. Sorumu cevapla."
languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dev adam, hoşnutsuzluğunu gösterdiğini bir şekilde bildiğin metalik bir çarpışma sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "İnsan... Sana anlaman gereken bir dilde hitap ediyorum. Sorumu cevapla."

languages.text: {n}Der Riese stößt ein metallisches Klirren aus, um seinem Unmut Ausdruck zu verleihen.{/n} "Mensch, ich spreche in einer Sprache mit dir, die du verstehen solltest. Beantworte meine Frage."
languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Riese stößt ein metallisches Klirren aus, um seinem Unmut Ausdruck zu verleihen.{/n} "Mensch, ich spreche in einer Sprache mit dir, die du verstehen solltest. Beantworte meine Frage."

languages.text: {n}巨人が金属のぶつかり合うような音を発する。それが彼の不快の表れであることが、あなたにはなぜか分かる。{/n}「人間よ、お前が理解できるはずの言語で語りかけている。私の問いに答えろ」
languages.original_text: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."
